headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 20 points and 10 assists, and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Minnesota Timberwolves 116-103 on Sunday for their eighth straight win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander keeps record 20-point streak alive as Thunder win 8th straight, beat Timberwolves
